message:
fix(storage/git-lock): remove owner metadata before lock in dead-PID branch (br-vu4y0)

The dead-PID branch in try_clean_stale_git_lock removed index.lock
before index.lock.owner, unlike every other stale-reclaim branch
(which were fixed in 4ae1589c). This left a TOCTOU window where a
racing git could acquire a fresh lock paired with stale dead-PID
owner metadata. Swap the unlink order to match the rest of the
function.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
